understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to place every selectable piece simultaneously onto the goal tiles marked '+' in the semantic grid. I was supposed to navigate and coordinate both pieces so that they both ended up on goals at the same time, but I failed to achieve that within the step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the selected piece in the chosen direction by discrete steps (3 pixels per cell). CLICK switches control to another selectable piece at the given pixel coordinates. Movement can be blocked by walls, and some objects might be pushable, though I did not test pushing thoroughly. I wasted steps by clicking back and forth without advancing either piece toward the goals effectively.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to place every selectable piece simultaneously onto the goal tiles marked '+' in the semantic grid. I was supposed to navigate and coordinate both pieces so that they both ended up on goals at the same time, but I failed to achieve that within the step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the selected piece in the chosen direction by discrete steps (3 pixels per cell). CLICK switches control to another selectable piece at the given pixel coordinates. Movement can be blocked by walls, and some objects might be pushable, though I did not test pushing thoroughly. I wasted steps by clicking back and forth without advancing either piece toward the goals effectively.
